Who We Are

Where Every Moment Becomes a Memory

QG Agency is a Lagos-based full-spectrum creative agency founded in 2021. Through QG Royal Events, we plan and execute events that go beyond the ordinary — delivering experiences that linger long after the day is done.


From corporate conferences to grand weddings, we show up with the same passion and precision every single time. Budget-friendly. Detail-obsessed. Fully committed to your vision.


Learn More About Us
What We Do

Our Services

View All Services
01
Weddings

Traditional ceremonies, white weddings, engagement parties and receptions — all planned with love and executed to perfection.

02
Corporate Events

Award nights, company dinners, brand activations and team events delivered with the professionalism your brand deserves.

03
Birthday Parties

Kids' parties, milestone celebrations and surprise events — designed from theme to final detail to wow every guest.

04
Product Launches

High-energy activations that put your brand in the spotlight and leave the room talking long after it ends.

05
Conferences & Seminars

End-to-end conference management from logistics to AV to on-the-day coordination. Seamless, every time.

06
Talent & Staffing

Professional ushers, bouncers, models and on-screen talent for events, movies and brand campaigns.

Why QG Agency

Giving Memorable Experiences
Our Story
About Us
Mrs. Grace Udoka
Founder & Chief Executive Officer
QG Agency · QG Royal Events
Est. 2021 · Lagos, Nigeria

We Build More Than Events

QG Agency was founded in 2021 with a clear purpose — to give people and organisations in Lagos access to event planning that is both excellent and affordable. Too often, great execution came at a price that shut most people out. We changed that.

Through our events arm, QG Royal Events, we handle everything from concept to close — weddings, corporate events, conferences, birthdays, product launches and burial receptions. Every single event gets the same level of care and attention, regardless of the budget.

Beyond events, we represent models and on-screen talent for movies and brand campaigns, and we supply professionally trained ushers, event staff and bouncers to ensure every corner of your event runs smoothly.

Our motto — Giving Memorable Experiences — is not a slogan. It is a standard we hold ourselves to on every brief we accept.

01
Our Mission

To deliver world-class event experiences that are accessible, personal and unforgettable — for every client, at every budget level.

02
Our Vision

To become the most trusted full-spectrum events and talent agency in Nigeria — known not for our size, but for the quality of every experience we create.

03
Our Values

Integrity in every deal. Precision in every plan. Warmth in every interaction. And an unwavering commitment to making things right when they go wrong.

Leadership

Meet the CEO

Mrs. Grace Udoka
Founder & Chief Executive Officer

Mrs. Grace Udoka is the visionary behind QG Agency and QG Royal Events. With a passion for turning ordinary occasions into extraordinary experiences, she founded the agency in 2021 with a clear mission — to bring world-class event planning within reach of every client in Nigeria.

Under her leadership, QG Agency has grown into a full-spectrum agency offering events, talent management and professional staffing — all guided by the same standard of excellence she set from day one.

What We Offer
Our Services
Full Service Offering

Everything Under One Roof

You don't need five vendors. You need one agency that handles everything — and handles it well. Here is the full picture of what QG Agency offers.

01
Weddings

Traditional ceremonies, white weddings, engagement parties and receptions planned with love and executed to perfection. From décor to catering coordination, we handle it all so you can focus on each other.

02
Corporate Events

Award nights, company dinners, AGMs, brand activations and team events — delivered with the professionalism and polish your organisation demands. We understand corporate environments and plan accordingly.

03
Birthday Parties

Kids' parties, milestone celebrations and surprise events designed to create lasting memories. From the theme concept to the final decoration, we make every birthday feel like the most special one yet.

04
Conferences & Seminars

End-to-end conference management — logistics, AV setup, speaker coordination, registration, and on-the-day support. Whether it is 50 or 500 attendees, we keep everything running without a hitch.

05
Product Launches

High-impact activations that put your brand firmly in the spotlight. We design launch experiences that generate buzz, capture attention and convert audiences into loyal customers.

06
Burial & Funeral Services

Dignified, well-organised funeral receptions and tribute ceremonies handled with the utmost respect and sensitivity. We take the coordination burden off the family so they can focus on what matters most.

Beyond Events

Talent, Models & Staffing

QG Agency goes beyond event planning. We represent models and talent for movies, brand promotions, photo shoots and entertainment. We also supply professionally trained event staff and security to ensure your event runs smoothly from entrance to exit.
